# phare_integration (Data Source)

Fetches a single integration by app and either ID or name. Exactly one of 'id' or 'name' must be specified.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "phare_integration" "email" {
  app  = "email"
  name = "Default"
}

data "phare_integration" "email" {
  app  = "slack"
  name = "DevOps Team"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The app key to filter integrations. Valid values: sms, discord, email, ilert, ntfy, outgoing_webhook, pushover, slack, telegram

### Optional

- `id` (Number) The ID of the integration to fetch. Exactly one of 'id' or 'name' must be specified.
- `name` (String) The name of the integration to fetch. Exactly one of 'id' or 'name' must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Date of creation
- `paused` (Boolean) Integration paused status
- `updated_at` (String) Date of last update
